subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out! We're also excited about the potential synergy between our teams and would welcome an introductory call.

Would any of the following slots work for you?
• Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00  
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time suits you best.

Regarding internal contact information and personnel details, I'm unable to share those directly. For publicly available contact information, please visit our website.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
